summary: The current register extract for an Srl is the visura camerale ordinaria issued by the Camera di Commercio / InfoCamere from the Registro delle Imprese. It is the base document evidencing registered facts.

evidence.basis: Codice civile art. 2188 (istituzione del registro delle imprese) and the InfoCamere/Registro Imprese public visura service

documentLocal: visura camerale ordinaria (sezione soci / compagine sociale)
summary: Yes: since the libro soci for Srl was abolished (D.L. 185/2008 conv. L. 2/2009), the current soci and their quotas are recorded in the Registro delle Imprese and shown on the visura. Quota transfers take effect toward the company only from deposit in the register (art. 2470 c.c.), so the register is the authoritative source of the current membership.

evidence.basis: L. 2/2009 art. 16, comma 12-septies — soppressione del libro soci per le Srl
evidence.quote: la soppressione dell'obbligo della tenuta del libro soci per le Srl (art. 16, comma 12-septies)
evidence.note: Official Camera di Commercio (Pisa) explanatory page. Publicity of the compagine sociale moved into the Registro delle Imprese, appearing on the visura.

evidence.quote: Il trasferimento delle partecipazioni ha effetto di fronte alla società dal momento del deposito
evidence.note: Deposit in the registro delle imprese makes a transfer effective toward the company — confirms the register holds the current soci.

evidence.basis: Codice civile art. 2478 — libri sociali obbligatori Srl; n.1 (libro soci) abrogato da D.L. 185/2008

caveats: The ordinary visura shows the current soci; for the fully itemised per-member quota breakdown a dedicated 'visura elenco soci / partecipazioni' report from the same Registro Imprese data is typically pulled — same registry source, more detail.
Register data reflects the last deposited transfer; a very recent transfer not yet deposited (30-day notary deadline, art. 2470) may not appear.

summary: The constitution (atto costitutivo and statuto) is filed at the Registro delle Imprese on incorporation and is retrievable as a separate archived document, distinct from the visura extract.

evidence.basis: Codice civile art. 2463 (costituzione Srl) with deposit of the atto costitutivo at the registro delle imprese; the atto/statuto are archived and retrievable via the Registro Imprese document service

caveats: UNVERIFIED URL: deposit obligation well established (c.c. art. 2463 and general deposit rule of art. 2330 richiamato), but the article-specific statute page was not fetched verbatim; cited URL is the official registry portal.

summary: An Srls is a variant of the Srl; its current register extract is the same visura camerale ordinaria from the Registro delle Imprese.

evidence.basis: Codice civile art. 2463-bis (Srl semplificata), registered in the Registro delle Imprese like any Srl

documentLocal: visura camerale ordinaria (sezione soci / compagine sociale)
summary: An Srls follows the Srl regime: no libro soci, current soci recorded in the Registro delle Imprese and shown on the visura, with transfers effective on deposit (art. 2470 c.c.).

evidence.basis: Codice civile art. 2463-bis — Srls governed by the Srl rules save specific derogations; libro soci abolished for all Srl by L. 2/2009 art. 16 c. 12-septies
evidence.quote: la soppressione dell'obbligo della tenuta del libro soci per le Srl (art. 16, comma 12-septies)

evidence.basis: Codice civile art. 2470, comma 1 (transfer effective on deposit in registro imprese)
evidence.quote: Il trasferimento delle partecipazioni ha effetto di fronte alla società dal momento del deposito

caveats: INFERENCE: Srls treated identically to Srl for soci publicity (art. 2463-bis subjects Srls to Srl rules generally); standard but not separately quoted for Srls specifically.

summary: The Srls atto costitutivo follows a mandatory standardised model (art. 2463-bis c.c.) and is filed at and retrievable from the Registro delle Imprese as a separate document.

evidence.basis: Codice civile art. 2463-bis — atto costitutivo redatto secondo modello standard tipizzato, depositato presso il registro delle imprese

caveats: UNVERIFIED URL: article-specific statute page not fetched verbatim; cited URL is the official registry portal. The Srls uses a fixed statutory model rather than a freely negotiated statuto.

summary: The current register extract for an SpA is the visura camerale ordinaria from the Registro delle Imprese.

evidence.basis: Codice civile art. 2188 + InfoCamere/Registro Imprese public visura service

documentLocal: elenco dei soci (deposito ex art. 2435, comma 2, c.c.)
summary: SpA shareholders are NOT on the visura: the authoritative shareholder register is the private libro soci kept by the directors (art. 2421 n.1). However, a non-listed SpA must deposit an annual elenco dei soci at the Registro delle Imprese together with the bilancio (art. 2435, comma 2, c.c.), and that filing is a retrievable public document evidencing the shareholders as at the last accounts-approval date.

evidence.basis: Codice civile art. 2421, comma 1, n.1 — the libro dei soci is a mandatory SpA book kept internally (private, not filed)
evidence.quote: il libro dei soci ... a cura degli amministratori o dei componenti del consiglio di gestione

evidence.basis: Codice civile art. 2435, comma 2 — annual deposit of the elenco dei soci for non-listed companies
evidence.quote: Entro trenta giorni dall'approvazione del bilancio le società non aventi azioni quotate in mercati regolamentati sono tenute altresì a depositare per l'iscrizione nel registro delle imprese l'elenco dei soci riferito alla data di approvazione del bilancio, con l'indicazione del numero delle azioni possedute
evidence.note: The L. 2/2009 abolition of the elenco-soci filing applied ONLY to Srl, not to SpA — the SpA obligation under art. 2435 remains in force.

caveats: The register filing is a SNAPSHOT as at the last bilancio-approval date and can be up to ~15 months stale; it is NOT real-time and is NOT the legally authoritative record — rights are exercised on the private libro soci.
Applies only to non-listed SpA. For listed SpA there is NO elenco soci in the register — ownership runs through Monte Titoli/Consob transparency (effectively not_provable_from_registry).
A socio unico is separately registered and public under art. 2362 c.c., so a single-shareholder SpA's owner IS in the register regardless of the bilancio filing.

summary: The SpA atto costitutivo and statuto are deposited at the Registro delle Imprese on incorporation (art. 2330 c.c.) and archived, retrievable as a separate document distinct from the visura.

evidence.basis: Codice civile art. 2330 — deposit of the atto costitutivo of an SpA at the ufficio del registro delle imprese; atto and statuto archived and retrievable

caveats: UNVERIFIED URL: article-specific statute page (art. 2330) not fetched verbatim; cited URL is the official registry portal. Deposit/retrievability itself is well established.

summary: A registered Snc's current register extract is the visura camerale ordinaria from the Registro delle Imprese.

evidence.basis: Codice civile art. 2296 — iscrizione della società in nome collettivo nel registro delle imprese

caveats: An irregular (unregistered) Snc has no register extract, but such a company would not appear in KYC registry sourcing at all.

summary: In a partnership there is no libro soci; the partners (soci) are named in the registered atto costitutivo (art. 2295 c.c.) and every change is registered, so the current soci appear directly on the visura.

evidence.basis: Codice civile art. 2295 (contenuto dell'atto costitutivo, incl. i soci) e art. 2296 (deposito/iscrizione nel registro delle imprese)

caveats: INFERENCE: statutory basis (art. 2295/2296) cited but not fetched verbatim in this run. That partner identities are public on the visura for registered partnerships is well established operationally.

summary: The Snc atto costitutivo (patti sociali) is deposited at the Registro delle Imprese (art. 2296 c.c.) and retrievable as a separate archived document.

evidence.basis: Codice civile art. 2296 — deposito dell'atto costitutivo per l'iscrizione nel registro delle imprese

caveats: UNVERIFIED URL: article-specific page not fetched verbatim; cited URL is the registry portal.

summary: A registered Sas's current register extract is the visura camerale ordinaria from the Registro delle Imprese.

evidence.basis: Codice civile art. 2317 (rinvia alle norme sulla Snc, incl. iscrizione ex art. 2296)

documentLocal: visura camerale ordinaria (soci accomandatari e accomandanti)
summary: There is no libro soci; both the general partners (accomandatari) and the limited partners (accomandanti) are named in the registered atto costitutivo and any change is registered, so the current soci appear on the visura.

evidence.basis: Codice civile art. 2317 + art. 2295/2296 (richiamati) — soci indicati nell'atto costitutivo iscritto nel registro delle imprese

caveats: INFERENCE: statutory basis cited but not fetched verbatim; that both accomandatari and accomandanti are shown on the visura for a registered Sas is well established operationally.

summary: The Sas atto costitutivo is deposited at the Registro delle Imprese (art. 2317 richiamando art. 2296 c.c.) and retrievable as a separate archived document.

evidence.basis: Codice civile art. 2317 e art. 2296 — deposito dell'atto costitutivo per l'iscrizione nel registro delle imprese

caveats: UNVERIFIED URL: article-specific page not fetched verbatim; cited URL is the registry portal.
